_about: Friday to Friday Podcast episode guide. One entry per episode. episode_number is provisional/site-assigned (the channel does not publish official numbers) — reorder as the backlog is filled. transcript_source flags caption quality: 'youtube-auto' = machine-generated, lower quality, swap later without touching code.

episodes.title: Tyler, the Creator's Whisper Rap Twist
episodes.synopsis: The hosts unpack the surprise Tyler, the Creator feature on YG's "On the Low" — bracing for whisper-rap and getting a laid-back subversion instead — and name their favorite cuts on the album.

episodes.title: Flyana Boss — Under the Influence
episodes.synopsis: A high-energy look at Flyana Boss's "Under the Influence" — eight songs of catchy, club-ready bangers, with standouts Wasabi, Bands Up, Jungle, and the EDM-trap "Feeling It."

episodes.title: RJ Payne — Growing Paynes EP
episodes.synopsis: A quick take on RJ Payne's five-track "Growing Paynes" EP — sharp lyricism over Padre's boom-bap beats, and a more introspective turn from Payne.
